name: Camping
desc: D.L. Bliss, Sugar Pine, Fallen Leaf — 300+ sites with lake views.

name: Hiking
desc: 165+ miles of trails from Tahoe Rim to Desolation Wilderness.

name: Kayaking
desc: Paddle Emerald Bay, Cave Rock, and Sand Harbor on crystal-clear water.

name: Mountain Biking
desc: Flume Trail, Mr Toads Wild Ride — world-class Sierra singletrack.

name: Skiing & Riding
desc: 14 resorts: Palisades, Heavenly, Northstar, Sierra-at-Tahoe, and more.

name: Snowshoeing
desc: Ellis Peak, Spooner Lake, Cascade Falls — serene winter wonderlands.

name: Fishing
desc: Mackinaw trout up to 37 lbs. Guided lake charters year-round.

name: Paddleboarding
desc: Glassy morning water, 70+ ft visibility. Rentals at 8 locations.

name: Rock Climbing
desc: Lovers Leap and Luther Spires — world-class granite sport climbing.

name: Backpacking
desc: Desolation Wilderness multi-day routes through dramatic Sierra terrain.

name: Swimming
desc: Sand Harbor, Emerald Bay, Kings Beach — pristine, 70+ ft visibility.

name: Wildlife Watching
desc: Black bears, bald eagles, mule deer, osprey — guided tours spring–fall.
